system.description:
Ghostly Guards

Ancestors have been ritually infused into the defense site, it is a dynastic holding. The spirits are old, and insane, but strategically placed to act out their madness in the most damaging way.

Did the family get special permission to harbor ghosts? Do they have connections to limmers? Are spirits tied to leviathan bone shards? Are they moving pictures, or conversationalists with clues?

Dangers

The ghosts are legally protected, like landmarks or artwork. Damaging them is a serious crime.

Some of the more powerful or canny ghosts are still somewhat sane collaborators with the site owners.

Remedies

They are out of control, and few dare to enter the site now (or it is abandoned.)

They will not harm family members (but may not react well to hostages.)
